name: Flowgear
description: Flowgear — iPaaS for connecting SaaS, on-prem databases, ERPs, and APIs. Visual designer with reusable connector patterns and on-prem agents.

seo.title: Flowgear — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Flowgear: Flowgear — iPaaS for connecting SaaS, on-prem databases, ERPs, and APIs. Visual designer with reusable connector patterns and on-prem agents.

when_to_use: Visual iPaaS connecting SaaS, on-prem ERPs and databases
Reusable connector patterns for enterprise system integration
API integration workflows without custom connector engineering
ERP to SaaS data synchronization for mid-market enterprises
SAP and Sage integration with cloud SaaS via visual flows

pros: iPaaS with strong on-prem agent support
Connects legacy ERPs many tools ignore
cons: Less brand recognition than Boomi or MuleSoft
Documentation not as deep as top-tier rivals
UI less modern than newer iPaaS entrants
review.verdict: Underrated mid-market iPaaS for hybrid environments, but lacks the brand pull of bigger rivals.
review.best_for: Mid-market companies connecting legacy ERPs to modern SaaS apps
review.not_for: Teams needing a widely-adopted platform with large consulting ecosystem

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
